nav_view_only_title: You have read-only access to this company.
settings_scheduling_hours_rest: asks for hours/day across a start and end date.
settings_scheduling_days_rest: asks for a start, days of work, and days over — the end date follows from how thinly the work is spread.
settings_scheduling_blocks_rest: asks only for a start and days over — a pure booking with no load, so utilisation is ignored.
settings_calendar_intro: Applies to the whole team — sets which day starts the week and the time zone used to determine "today".
settings_calendar_frozen_hint: Set when the company was created and can't be changed.
settings_disciplines_intro: Group people by discipline across the app. Turn this off if your team doesn't use disciplines — they're then hidden from the schedule, resource form and navigation. Your existing discipline data is kept and reappears if you turn it back on.
settings_schedule_intro: How the week grid is drawn — applies to this browser. Minimise weekends shrinks the Saturday and Sunday columns so the working week dominates the view. Weekend work still shows; the columns just narrow. Snap to week start keeps the first day of the week pinned to the left edge so a stray scroll doesn't nudge the view onto a mid-week day.
settings_placeholders_intro: Placeholders are unfilled "slots" you can pencil in before a person is assigned — set per company. Off by default; when off they're hidden everywhere (the schedule, the assignee picker and the Resources list) but their data is kept.
settings_external_intro: Set per company. Off by default; when off externals are hidden everywhere (the schedule, the assignee picker and the Resources list) but their data is kept.
settings_bar_labels_intro: What each bar on the schedule shows before the activity name — applies to this browser.
settings_utilisation_intro: Which utilisation figures appear on the scheduler.
settings_appearance_intro: Theme — applies to this browser. “Match system” follows your operating system.
settings_members_intro: Manage who can access this company. Invite people, change a member's role, or remove them.
